aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited structured data, minimal authority signals, and lack of conversational content.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed business information.
Create and mark up an FAQ page with HVAC-related questions and answers.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized and is currently invisible to Google AI, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: GBP is not set up or claimed.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A to engage potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is excellent with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories and industry-specific sites.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and authority signals prevents AI from recognizing them as a credible source.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and emergency repair requests.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with the necessary structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcase certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for AEO and GBP.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is not found, and their website lacks critical schema markup, making them invisible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing structured data, optimizing GBP, and creating conversational content to boost AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing market share to them.

email_subject_line: Boost AI Visibility: Optimize Your HVAC Business for the Future
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found that while your NAP consistency is strong, your AI readiness is lacking.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and drive more qualified leads.
